purpose: The canonical trigger list that forces TWO independent checks (agreeing on conclusion AND reason) before a decision may author/apply. Consumed by validate_linguistic_decisions.required_gate(). A decision carrying any of these in grammar_triggers must declare gate>=two_vote_required (or stricter if a never_auto/human trigger is also present).

two_vote_protocol.independence: the two checks must be independent (different lens/agent), not one check repeated
two_vote_protocol.fail_open: if the two disagree on EITHER conclusion or reasoning -> pending (never ship the majority guess)
